---
description: Coding Standards
---
# Coding Standards
## Naming Standards
- Variables: CamelCase
- Constants: Uppercase SNAKECASE
- Types: PascalCase
- Files: SnakeCase
## Code Structure
- Maximum Function Length: 100 lines
- Maximum File Length: 500 lines
- Extract complex logic into independent functions
- Each function is responsible for only one function
## Documentation
- Add documentation comments to all exported functions
- Add inline comments to complex logic
- Include a README for each module
## Git Workflow
- Feature Branch Naming: feature/TICKET-123-description
- Commit Message Format: type(scope): message
- Compress commits before merging
